arts.ttl: Man City hopeful of Deadline Day deal for Gonzalez
arts.sum: Manchester City are hopeful of concluding a Deadline Day deal for Porto midfielder Nico Gonzalez.

arts.ttl: Monday's Primeira Liga predictions including Rio Ave vs. Porto
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Primeira Liga fixtures, including Rio Ave vs. Porto.

arts.ttl: Man City interested in signing Porto's Gonzalez
arts.sum: Sources in Portugal say City have already had a bid turned down for the 23-year-old former Barcelona player.

arts.ttl: Man City discussing £30m fee for Porto midfielder as Pep Guardiola's side look to continue adding to their squad in bid to save their season
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Manchester City are discussing a fee of around £30million for a Porto midfielder. The player has a release clause of £50million. .
